Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Crown Crafts, Inc. And Hamco, Inc.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL AND ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO CROWN CRAFTS, INC. AND HAMCO, INC.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 301; ODD NUMBERED CASE. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Hearing On Plaintiff Center For Environmental Health'S Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Crown Crafts, Inc. And Hamco, Inc.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MARK N. TODZO OF THE LEXINGTON LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 759-4111 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. TODZO PRESENTED TO THE COURT A DECLARATION OF BRIAN C. LEE WHICH WAS FILED THIS MORNING ADDRESSING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT IN IT'S TENTATIVE RULING. AFTER IT'S REVIEW, THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION REQUIREMENT WAS MET AND SOLVES THE ISSUE ON THE ADEQUACY OF WARNING. FEES ARE ALSO REASONABLE. PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL AND ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO CROWN CRAFTS INC AND HAMCO INCORPORAED IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AL
